content:
MODULE: cosmos.core.langgraph_workflows
FILE: cosmos/core/langgraph_workflows.py (823 lines)
CATEGORY: core

DESCRIPTION: Cosmos LangGraph Workflows - Hybrid Nexus + Stateful Workflows.

AGI v1.8 Feature: Combines Nexus event-driven architecture with
LangGraph-style stateful workflows for complex multi-step operations.

Features:
- WorkflowState: TypedDict for workflow state management
- WorkflowCheckpoint: Persistent 

CLASSES:
- WorkflowStatus(Enum): Status of a workflow execution.
- NodeType(Enum): Type of workflow node.
- WorkflowState(TypedDict): TypedDict for workflow state - compatible with LangGraph patterns.
- WorkflowNode: Definition of a workflow node.
- WorkflowCheckpoint: Checkpoint for workflow persistence and resumption.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
  Methods: def from_dict(cls, data: dict) -> 'WorkflowCheckpoint'
- WorkflowDefinition: Complete workflow definition with nodes and transitions.
- LangGraphNexusHybrid: Bridges Nexus event bus with LangGraph-style stateful workflows.

This hybrid sy
  Methods: def connect_nexus(self, nexus) -> None
  Methods: def register_workflow(self, definition: WorkflowDefinition) -> None
  Methods: def create_workflow(self, name: str, description: str, nodes: list[WorkflowNode], start_node: str='s
  Methods: async def start_workflow(self, definition_id: str, inputs: dict, context: Optional[dict]=None) -> st
  Methods: async def checkpoint_workflow(self, workflow_id: str) -> str
  Methods: async def resume_workflow(self, checkpoint_id: str) -> str
  Methods: def on_nexus_signal(self, signal_type: str, handler: Callable[[dict], Awaitable[None]]) -> None
  Methods: async def emit_with_workflow_state(self, workflow_id: str, signal_type: str, additional_payload: Opt
- DeliberationWorkflow: Standard workflow for agent deliberation.

Flow: PROPOSE -> CRITIQUE -> REFINE -
  Methods: async def start(self, topic: str, participants: list[str], context: Optional[dict]=None) -> str
- TaskExecutionWorkflow: Standard workflow for task execution.

Flow: PLAN -> ASSIGN -> EXECUTE -> VERIFY
  Methods: async def start(self, task_description: str, required_capabilities: Optional[list[str]]=None, contex

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def create_langgraph_hybrid(data_dir: str='./data/workflows') -> LangGraphNexusHybrid
- def create_deliberation_workflow(hybrid: LangGraphNexusHybrid) -> DeliberationWorkflow
- def create_task_workflow(hybrid: LangGraphNexusHybrid) -> TaskExecutionWorkflow
